parent.description: The parent resource in the Cloud Resource Hierarchy, such as an organization, that the access policy is associated with. Must be in the format "organizations/{organization_id}".

scopes.description: Specifies the G Suite or Cloud Identity organizations that the access policy applies to; must be provided in the format `organizations/{org_id}`.

timeouts.description: Specifies the time duration for create, update, and delete operations on the access policy.

title.description: Specifies the human-readable title of the access policy, must be unique within the organization.
